DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MB_DynamicGameObject Class Reference
Inheritance diagram for DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MB_DynamicGameObject:

bool Initialize (bool beingDeleted)
 
bool InitializeNew (bool beingDeleted, GameObject go)
 
void UnInitialize ()
 
int CompareTo (MB_DynamicGameObject b)
 

Public Attributes

int instanceID
 
GameObject gameObject
 
string name
 
int vertIdx
 
int blendShapeIdx
 
int numVerts
 
int numBlendShapes
 
int numBoneWeights
 
bool isSkinnedMeshWithBones = false
 
int[] indexesOfBonesUsed = new int[0]
 
int lightmapIndex = -1
 
Vector4 lightmapTilingOffset = new Vector4(1f, 1f, 0f, 0f)
 
Vector3 meshSize = Vector3.one
 
bool show = true
 
bool invertTriangles = false
 
int[] submeshTriIdxs
 combined mesh will have one submesh per result material source meshes can have any number of submeshes.They are mapped to a result submesh based on their material if two different submeshes have the same material they are merged in the same result submesh
 
int[] submeshNumTris
 
int[] targetSubmeshIdxs
 These are source go mesh submeshCount todo combined these into a class. Maps each submesh in source mesh to a submesh in combined mesh.
 
Rect[] uvRects
 The UVRects in the combinedMaterial atlas.
 
Rect[] encapsulatingRect
 If AllPropsUseSameMatTiling is the rect that was used for sampling the atlas texture from the source texture including both mesh uvTiling and material tiling. else is the source mesh obUVrect. We don't need to care which.
 
Rect[] sourceMaterialTiling
 If AllPropsUseSameMatTiling is the source texture material tiling. else is 0,0,1,1. We don't need to care which.
 
Rect[] obUVRects
 The obUVRect for each source mesh submesh;.
 
int[] textureArraySliceIdx
 The index of the texture array slice.
 
Material[] sourceSharedMaterials

Rect [] DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.MB_DynamicGameObject.encapsulatingRect

If AllPropsUseSameMatTiling is the rect that was used for sampling the atlas texture from the source texture including both mesh uvTiling and material tiling. else is the source mesh obUVrect. We don't need to care which.
